title: ambrosia humilis
intro: Ambrosia humilis, also known as Ragweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ambrosia humilis include reducing inflammation and relieving coughs, colds, and sinus congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. Ambrosia humilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
